description: SliceOfStatus demonstrates how to use a slice of enum values. This type will be represented as an array of enum values in the schema.

items.description:
Status represents the state of an item in the system. This enum type will be represented as a string with a fixed set of possible values.

pending: 
StatusPending indicates the item is waiting to be processed.

in_progress: 
StatusInProgress indicates the item is currently being processed.

completed: 
StatusCompleted indicates the item has been successfully processed.

failed: 
StatusFailed indicates the processing of the item has failed.
